requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容与无线电注册
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容與無線電註冊

summary.en: Motor-driven power tools, electronic speed controllers, chargers, and power supplies should not generate excessive electromagnetic disturbance and should have adequate immunity. Where a cordless tool includes a radio function such as Bluetooth or a wireless link, the radio module must be registered with the Infocomm Media Development Authority under the IMDA equipment registration framework, which references IEC and SS EMC and radio standards. EMC for the safety-controlled tool is addressed within the SAFETY Mark technical file where the tool is in scope.
summary.zh: 电机驱动的电动工具、电子调速器、充电器和电源不应产生过量电磁骚扰，并应具备足够抗扰度。当无绳工具包含蓝牙或无线连接等无线电功能时，无线电模块须按 IMDA 设备注册框架向新加坡资讯通信媒体发展局注册，该框架引用 IEC 及 SS 的电磁兼容和无线电标准。对于范围内的安全受控工具，其电磁兼容在 SAFETY Mark 技术文件中处理。
summary.zht: 電機驅動的電動工具、電子調速器、充電器和電源不應產生過量電磁騷擾，並應具備足夠抗擾度。當無繩工具包含藍牙或無線連接等無線電功能時，無線電模組須按 IMDA 設備註冊框架向新加坡資訊通信媒體發展局註冊，該框架引用 IEC 及 SS 的電磁相容和無線電標準。對於範圍內的安全受控工具，其電磁相容在 SAFETY Mark 技術文件中處理。

standards_or_laws: IMDA equipment registration framework for radio-communications and short-range devices (cordless tools with a radio function)
Relevant IEC and SS EMC standards referenced for in-scope apparatus
EMC evidence within the SAFETY Mark technical file where the tool is a Controlled Good

summary.en: China compliance packages may include EMC reports alongside GB/T 3883 safety reports, and radio modules may carry an SRRC type approval. Test limits, worst-case operating modes, charger inclusion, and any radio module still need Singapore-specific review for IMDA registration and EMC acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国合规包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全报告之外包含 EMC 报告，无线电模块可能持有 SRRC 型号核准。测试限值、最不利工况、是否包含充电器以及任何无线电模块仍需按新加坡要求复核，以完成 IMDA 注册和电磁兼容接受。
summary.zht: 中國合規包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全報告之外包含 EMC 報告，無線電模組可能持有 SRRC 型號核准。測試限值、最不利工況、是否包含充電器以及任何無線電模組仍需按新加坡要求覆核，以完成 IMDA 註冊和電磁相容接受。

standards_or_laws: China EMC standards and test reports where applicable
SRRC type approval for radio modules where applicable

gap.en: A frequent gap is treating China EMC reports and SRRC radio approval as sufficient for Singapore. A radio-enabled cordless tool needs IMDA equipment registration, and EMC evidence should reflect the exact marketed configuration including the charger, battery pack, and controller variants.
gap.zh: 常见差距是把中国 EMC 报告和 SRRC 无线电核准视为对新加坡已足够。具备无线电功能的无绳工具需 IMDA 设备注册，且电磁兼容证据应反映实际销售配置，包括充电器、电池包和控制器变体。
gap.zht: 常見差距是把中國 EMC 報告和 SRRC 無線電核准視為對新加坡已足夠。具備無線電功能的無繩工具需 IMDA 設備註冊，且電磁相容證據應反映實際銷售配置，包括充電器、電池包和控制器變體。

target.en: Mandatory for cordless tools with a radio function: IMDA equipment registration before supply. EMC adequacy for an in-scope safety-controlled tool is handled within the SAFETY Mark file. EMC for a non-controlled industrial tool relies on general product-safety and non-interference duties rather than a standalone marking.
target.zh: 对于具备无线电功能的无绳工具为强制：供货前须完成 IMDA 设备注册。范围内安全受控工具的电磁兼容充分性在 SAFETY Mark 文件中处理。非受控工业工具的电磁兼容依赖一般产品安全和不干扰义务，而非独立标识。
target.zht: 對於具備無線電功能的無繩工具為強制：供貨前須完成 IMDA 設備註冊。範圍內安全受控工具的電磁相容充分性在 SAFETY Mark 文件中處理。非受控工業工具的電磁相容依賴一般產品安全和不干擾義務，而非獨立標識。

cn.en: China domestic files may include EMC evidence and SRRC radio approval, but Singapore acceptance depends on IMDA registration and configuration mapping.
cn.zh: 中国境内文件可包含 EMC 证据和 SRRC 无线电核准，但新加坡接受性取决于 IMDA 注册和配置映射。
cn.zht: 中國境內文件可包含 EMC 證據和 SRRC 無線電核准，但新加坡接受性取決於 IMDA 註冊和配置映射。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Singapore-ready for a radio-enabled cordless tool until the radio module is registered under the IMDA equipment registration framework and EMC evidence covers the actual marketed tool system; China EMC reports and SRRC approval do not by themselves satisfy IMDA registration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于具备无线电功能的无绳工具，在无线电模块按 IMDA 设备注册框架完成注册且 EMC 证据覆盖实际销售工具系统之前，不能视为新加坡就绪；中国 EMC 报告和 SRRC 核准本身不能满足 IMDA 注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於具備無線電功能的無繩工具，在無線電模組按 IMDA 設備註冊框架完成註冊且 EMC 證據覆蓋實際銷售工具系統之前，不能視為新加坡就緒；中國 EMC 報告和 SRRC 核准本身不能滿足 IMDA 註冊。
